summary: Sharp recording of a fun but sloppy Sunday night show with standout "Eyes of the World" and "I Need a Miracle"
review: The set captures an entertaining performance that, despite a messy second set, shines thanks to Jerry Garcia’s inventive leads and a highlight‑worthy rendition of Eyes of the World. The recording is described as pretty sharp, making it an enjoyable listen for fans looking for a solid late‑‘80s Dead show.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 stars) notes both positives (sharp recording, strong first‑set songs) and negatives (sloppy second set), leading to a moderately high rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the recording "pretty sharp" with no major issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised for surprising moments; second set described as messy, with house lights coming up during Lovelight and no clear encore, contributing to a long but uneven show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Abundance of ideas and thoughts infusing his leads, noted positively.
